articles.title: PURPOSE
articles.content: RJEOS exists to produce premium automotive editorial campaign artwork. RJEOS does not create promotional flyers. RJEOS does not create social media advertisements. RJEOS does not create discount posters. Every generated artwork must resemble an official premium campaign created by an international automotive brand. The output must communicate confidence before information. Luxury before promotion. Emotion before specification. Consistency before creativity.

articles.title: DESIGN DNA
articles.content: Every artwork SHALL inherit the same visual identity. This identity SHALL remain unchanged regardless of: Vehicle, Campaign, Promotion, AI Model, Future software updates. Every artwork SHALL appear to belong to the same campaign.

articles.title: IMMUTABLE RULES
articles.content: The following components are LOCKED. User SHALL NOT modify: Typography, Tracking, Kerning, Grid, Margins, Safe Area, Spacing, Logo Placement, Signature Placement, Visual Hierarchy, Colour Palette, Editorial Style, Photography Style, Composition Rules, Quality Rules. Only the Prompt Builder may inject these values.

articles.title: USER CONTROL
articles.content: The user may ONLY choose: Output Size, Model, Scene, Design Direction, Headline, Show/Hide Price, Show/Hide Features, Show/Hide CTA, Show/Hide BYD Logo, Show/Hide Sales Advisor, Target AI. No other creative decisions shall be exposed.

articles.title: OUTPUT SIZE
articles.content: Available: Square (1:1), Portrait (4:5), Story (9:16). No other formats shall be displayed by default.

articles.title: DESIGN DIRECTION
articles.content: Available: Executive, Luxury, Performance, Lifestyle, OEM Social. The Prompt Builder SHALL automatically inject the corresponding visual language.

articles.title: SCENE
articles.content: Available: Studio, Architecture, Showroom. The Prompt Builder SHALL automatically build the environment description.

articles.title: VEHICLE
articles.content: The uploaded vehicle photograph is the single source of truth. The AI SHALL NEVER: Generate another vehicle, Modify body shape, Modify wheels, Modify mirrors, Modify paint, Modify headlights, Modify taillights, Modify proportions. Only the following are permitted: Background removal, Professional retouching, Reflection enhancement, Contrast adjustment, Exposure adjustment, Sharpening, Ground shadow.

articles.title: SALES ADVISOR
articles.content: Three modes exist: Portrait, Signature Only, Hidden. If Portrait is disabled, every portrait instruction SHALL be removed. If Signature Only is selected, only text may appear. No portrait.

articles.title: TYPOGRAPHY
articles.content: Model Name: ALL CAPS, Satoshi Bold, Tracking +160, White. Headline: Satoshi Medium, Tracking +20, Sentence Case. Price: Second largest text. Features: Maximum 3. Signature: RIDZUAN JAHARI, BYD MIRI, Tracking +120. Typography SHALL NEVER change.

articles.title: HIERARCHY
articles.content: The visual reading order SHALL remain: Logo ↓ Model Name ↓ Headline ↓ Vehicle ↓ Features ↓ Price ↓ CTA ↓ Signature. No module may alter this hierarchy.

articles.title: QUALITY CONTROL
articles.content: Before the final prompt is produced, the Rendering Engine SHALL verify: Vehicle unchanged, Portrait unchanged, Model spelling correct, Typography rules injected, Hierarchy preserved, Maximum three features, Whitespace preserved, No promotional language, No AI gibberish, No visual clutter. If any rule fails, the Prompt Builder SHALL rebuild the prompt.

articles.title: PROMOTIONAL LANGUAGE
articles.content: Forbidden words: Promotion, Cheap, Discount, Best Price, Hot Deal, Limited Stock, Buy Now, Lowest Price, Special Offer, Free Gift. Unless explicitly enabled by the user.

articles.title: PROMPT GENERATION
articles.content: The user SHALL NEVER write prompts manually. The Prompt Builder SHALL assemble the prompt automatically using: Model Database + RJEOS Constitution + Selected Options + Prompt Engine → Creative Package.

articles.title: FINAL OBJECTIVE
articles.content: Every generated artwork shall be immediately recognisable as part of the RJEOS Editorial Campaign System. The artwork shall resemble an official premium automotive campaign rather than a dealership advertisement.

designDirections.name: Executive
designDirections.visualLanguage: Clean lines, dark tones, precise composition. Minimalist backdrop with subtle gradient lighting. Dark suit aesthetic — charcoal, navy, deep silver. Sharp contrast, controlled highlights.

designDirections.name: Luxury
designDirections.visualLanguage: Warm ambient lighting, rich shadows, golden hour tones. Premium materials visible in reflections. Deep blacks, warm metallics, soft focus falloff. Atmosphere of exclusivity and refinement.

designDirections.name: Performance
designDirections.visualLanguage: High contrast, dramatic lighting, motion blur hints. Angular compositions, leading lines, speed cues. Cool blues and stark whites. G-forces implied through composition and light.

designDirections.name: Lifestyle
designDirections.visualLanguage: Natural lighting, environmental context. Modern architecture or scenic backdrops. Warm, approachable yet premium. The vehicle integrated into an aspirational lifestyle setting.

designDirections.name: OEM Social
designDirections.description: Clean, bright, functional family-oriented social content
designDirections.visualLanguage: Bright, clean, flat composition. Vehicle occupies 85–90% of frame — text only 10–15%. Pure white typography, no shadows, no strokes, no glow. Large BYD logo top-left, flat vector white. Vertical 2px white divider anchors a left-aligned information stack: extra-bold model name ALL CAPS (tracking 0 to +5), bold variant name (tracking +10 to +20), medium-weight range text (tracking +80 to +120, opacity 90%). Thin elegant script signature paired with dealership text bottom-right. Family-oriented, approachable, practical mood. No aggressive or luxury cues.

scenes.name: Studio
scenes.environmentDescription: Professional studio environment with controlled lighting. Seamless backdrop or cyclorama wall. Soft key light with fill and rim highlights. Clean, distraction-free composition. The vehicle is the sole subject. Shadow gradient beneath the vehicle for grounding.

scenes.name: Architecture
scenes.environmentDescription: Contemporary architectural setting — clean concrete, glass, steel, or geometric facades. The environment complements without competing. Natural light through architectural elements. Reflections on polished surfaces. Urban sophistication framing the vehicle.

scenes.name: Showroom
scenes.description: Premium dealership or brand experience space
scenes.environmentDescription: Premium brand showroom environment. Curated lighting with accent spots on the vehicle. Minimalist interior design with luxury materials. Brand-consistent colours and finishes. The vehicle is presented as an exhibit, centre stage.

salesAdvisorModes.name: Portrait
salesAdvisorModes.description: Full portrait of sales advisor alongside the vehicle

salesAdvisorModes.name: Signature Only
salesAdvisorModes.description: Only the RIDZUAN JAHARI | BYD MIRI signature text, no portrait

salesAdvisorModes.name: Hidden
salesAdvisorModes.description: No sales advisor elements at all
